_comment: Claude Desktop MCP config for lovagentic. Available once lovagentic v0.2 ships the MCP adapter. Copy the `lovagentic` block into your existing `~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` (macOS) or `%APPDATA%/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` (Windows). Claude will then be able to list your Lovable projects, send prompts, publish, and verify previews — all without leaving the chat.
